case_title: HENRY YEN VS. TOWN SKY INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEN, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT TOWN SKY INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEN, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWN SKY INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $4,825.04 PRINCIPAL, $5.95 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,035.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
